details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) all present; reports/audit/ exists.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ present with key docs; .cursor/automations/ present with README + specs; reports/audit/ present.
